recommendations.action: Accept WAIVED posture — 7 P2 ACs; Epic-2-substrate-claude-code-settings-policy class story (FIFTEENTH Epic 2 delivery; FIRST Claude-Code-host-layer substrate artifact at repo root; extends security barrier one level up from container-sandbox egress to Claude-Code-session permission resolution); TWENTY-FIFTH cumulative trace-WAIVED precedent (FIFTEENTH Epic 2; extends Story 2.14 iter-292 twenty-fourth); TWENTY-SIXTH ATDD-skip-trace-WAIVED co-application pairing overall (extends iter-297 ATDD-skip grounds (ii)+(iii)). Ground-(a)+(b) hybrid conjunction applied with PARTIAL ground-(c) variant-(ii) application ONLY to AC 5's behavioural signal — BROADER than Story 2.14 (pure (a)+(b)) + NARROWER than Story 2.13 (whole-AC-4 (a)+(b)+(c)-variant-(ii)).

Story 2.15 authors 2 NEW files (`.claude/settings.json` 556 bytes + `packages/keel-templates/src/seeds/.claude/settings.json` 556 bytes byte-identical per `diff` exit 0) + 4 modified files per iter-298 Dev Agent Record landing. Manifest count unchanged at 34 — Story 2.15 adds NO new InvariantSchema entry (distinct from Stories 2.10-2.14). `INV-claude-hook-secret-denylist` manifest entry is Story 2.16+2.17 scope.

Per-AC live fresh-fork verification — ACs 1/2/3/4/6/7 mechanically-regression-safe via Epic 13 test framework landing (vitest/playwright-equivalent contract tests over settings.json schema + seed diff + doc grep). AC 5 BEHAVIOURAL signal (live permission-layer deny-rule-pointer emission) remains operator-workstation-only even post-Epic-13 — requires live `claude` OAuth subprocess + browser-interactive first-auth + upstream endpoint. Story 2.15 sits between Story 2.14 (no AC operator-workstation-only) + Story 2.13 (AC 4 whole operator-workstation-only) in the ground-(c) application spectrum.

Story 2.17 SC-17 close-out candidate lints: (a) D-7 — Substrate-to-seed byte-identical diff lint (sibling to 2.13 D-5 + 2.14 D-6); (b) D-8 — NFR5a deny-list minimum-entry gate (forks MAY ADD but MUST NOT REMOVE the 13-pinned deny rules); (c) D-9 — `hooks` key precondition preservation (pre-Story-2.16 must not carry `hooks` top-level key). NFR5a gap (`Read(~/.ssh/**)` + `Read(~/.aws/credentials)`) revisit-at-SC-17 marker per iter-296 pre-dev SM pin (NOT a DEFER-queue entry).
Run /bmad-testarch-test-review to assess test quality (no tests exist — no-op; recorded for parity with downstream pipelines).
